documentation.title: Documentation
documentation.subtitle: Quick start guides and detailed instructions

building.title: Building from Source
building.content: To build from source, run the cargo command. The compiled executable will be at `target/release/ruin-injector.exe`.

running.title: Running the Application
running.content: Simply double-click the `ruin-injector.exe` file to launch the GUI application. For best results, right-click and select 'Run as administrator'.

selectDll.title: 1. Select DLL File
selectDll.content: Click the Browse button and navigate to your DLL file.

selectProcess.title: 2. Choose Target Process
selectProcess.content: Click the List button, use the search box to filter processes, and click on your desired process.

inject.title: 3. Inject
inject.content: Click the Inject DLL button and monitor the log section for success/error messages.

requirements.title: System Requirements
requirements.dll: The DLL file you want to inject

q1.question: Do I need administrator privileges?
q1.answer: Some processes require administrator access, but not all. The injector will attempt injection with current permissions and fail gracefully if elevation is required.

q2.question: Can I inject into system-protected processes?
q2.answer: No, system-protected processes like csrss.exe or lsass.exe cannot be injected for security reasons.

q3.question: Why does antivirus flag the injector?
q3.answer: DLL injection is a technique monitored by antivirus software. This is expected behavior for injection tools.

q4.question: How do I add a custom icon?
q4.answer: Place your .ico file as icon.ico in the project root directory and rebuild. See ICON.md for detailed instructions.

download.title: Ready to Get Started?
download.subtitle: Download Ruin DLL Injector and start injecting DLLs into your Windows applications.
